generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness doesn't just keep us safe—it strengthens our communities? By ensuring we're ready for any challenge, we're also protecting our values of independence and self-reliance. Let's support policies that empower local resilience and keep our neighborhoods secure. #CommunityFirst #PreparedNotScared
